title: Migration guidance from v1.x to v2.0
description:
Feature: Migration guidance from v1.x to v2.0
Scenario: Breaking changes are documented with replacement paths
Given a user upgrading from v1.x
When they read README and PR_FAQ migration sections
Then they can map removed APIs to V2 alternatives

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added migration-oriented documentation updates in README and PR_FAQ for v1->v2 breaking changes.
